hcb8759ecg2cafg42a1g858ag287b23440533: I suppose we'll have to make do.
h7743bbbeg3017g454fg8a98g4f565bde96fb: We will, son. Don't worry about it.
hbada6e45gf081g464fg86cagd244f2186302: No! Our so-called kin fled the moment their tails were in danger!
h280e76b3g1149g474dgb9c8g293d89af2036: Even that cursed wizard took off. Rolan's magic could have made all the difference, you know!
hb2c3bf2bg7d0cg4d36gbe32g58938460bfe3: Ikaron! We're in for a hell of a fight - focus on the matters at hand, not the ones you can't fix!
hff405095gfd7bg4bcfgb36cg3c926778dae6: Some of the others took off in the middle of the night. Left their own kin to fend for themselves.
h0a719a4cg5a43g4408g8a97g362d0783e7b0: The fools - they'll never make it to Baldur's Gate on their own.
h1901aadfg2e12g49cbga94cg7782983e6333: Which is their problem now, not ours.
he89f9325g306cg46e0ga25dg5bddf31308e2: She's right. The coming battle won't be easy.
h56ce380dg4e68g4579g9eefg1b5ff57d7b29: Exactly! And look: we're not on our own, are we? Not any more.
h2215d96bgc470g4fe4gb9dagff9e132c9e7e: I know. Thank you - for not running like the others.
h3a2e1cadgd440g4653g9360ga6a546daa199: Running's a smart move. Especially for us.
hbe49470cgee98g4805gbc39g8c6261ac3d53: Running's a smart move. Especially for a tiefling.
h4372d71fge3ddg4d1cgacacgc789c5813e5a: Exactly. Bloody traitors - the lot of them.
hc665091egdd77g47b9g903cg666657e95732: Cut it out, Ikaron! All this grousing is useless.
h769a2053g123ag4856g8f1bg4ea28824a56c: Clan is everything. Those tieflings gave up their honour.
h172ada34g3ea4g42b1gbe3dge8bf72f341f2: Sad thing, if that's the state of 'kin' these days.
h9f9f558cgf87cg4912g8231g8ebf4cf6a568: I'd be devastated if one of my own betrayed me.
h2e81cbb2gb34fg4594g985dg50b045e9099e: The past can't be changed. Focus on your future before that too is set in stone.
h1ba0ecb3g0155g4035g81eegf57d460aecb8: We might die because a bunch of traitors cared more about saving their hides then they did about us.
h03825e71g5e53g4c6dgb3bdgfa958463e694: Rage is fuel. Use it for the fight ahead, not to complain.
hc599c2a1gc9d2g449ag85c4g029aa8b6fa47: You're right. Lingering on this won't do much good.
hb893f643gaeddg4013g8876ga10361541fd4: Finally! Now can we all get back to work? Idle chatter isn't going to defeat those goblins.
h23b9ee5cgb25eg48b7g8511ge6454ec91e29: Your kin's probably bleeding out on a goblin pike right now. What a waste.
h1a5bd26eg5346g4569g9650g8c024f584aed: Enough! I will knock both of your heads together unless you cut it out.
h9384e724g3600g4ba1gb217g43f587150558: Not another word! Back to work - all of you! We've a battle to prepare for!
